text: You say nothing. You just look at the worm. The crown. The halo. The tiny gold marker highlights on its... segments.
Something about it is weirdly compelling. You can't explain it.

speaker: Grubwin
text: They're just looking at the poster.

speaker: Vermia
text: That IS the first communion, Grubwin. They're receiving.

speaker: Grubwin
text: They've been in the room for twenty seconds.

speaker: Vermia
text: Scatha does not work on our schedule.
You finally look away from the poster. Both of them are staring at you. Grubwin looks alarmed. Vermia looks like she just witnessed a miracle.

speaker: Vermia
text: I knew it. I KNEW it the moment I saw you. You're one of the sensitive ones. You can feel the worm energy.

speaker: [player]
text: I just thought it was a cool drawing.

speaker: Vermia
text: Yes. That's what they all say at first.
She says this with the satisfied tone of someone who has been proven right. Before you can clarify, the door opens.
